root_goal: CTX G1/G2 개선 — 리서치 기반 수렴까지
original_goal: G1/G2에 맞는 적절한 평가 방법 구축 + 수렴까지 개선

iter8_3run_average.note: Judge variance ~0.07 per run. 3-run average is reliable.

tried_improvements: concept weight tuning for large repos → NO EFFECT on FastAPI
.md in BM25 corpus → REGRESSION (IDF distortion), reverted to separate storage
key doc boost (README/CLAUDE +1.0) → HELPED for high-level queries
hybrid scoring (50% judge + 50% keyword) → CRITICAL (fixed granularity issue)
dead_ends: FastAPI external R@5 improvement beyond 0.40 (structural: duplicate queries, 1120 files)
Compact summary for G1 (project understanding needs full content, not signatures)
Dynamic concept_weight by repo size (no measurable improvement)
